home.description: Aluminium carpentry specialist in Mghira. Official Grifo Flex distributor — invisible protection, Italian quality.

partners.title: Our Mosquito Nets
partners.description: We distribute Grifo Flex mosquito nets — made in Italy, recognized for their quality and durability.

features.title: Why Choose Aluminium Space?
features.f1_desc: Robust and durable Grifo Flex mosquito nets.

products.colibri50_desc: Roller mosquito screen for windows with top cassette. Silent spring mechanism. Double brush-seal lateral channels. White aluminum structure RAL 9010.
products.sidney50_desc: Mosquito screen for doors with side cassette. Spring mechanism. Folding external handle. Double brush-seal channels. White aluminum structure.
products.sidney50ac_desc: Double-cassette mosquito screen for large openings and terraces. Bidirectional central opening. Spring mechanism. White aluminum structure.
products.elba_desc: Fixed panel mosquito screen for windows. White aluminum frame. PVC fiberglass mesh. Nylon wall fixings. Simple, economical and effective.

products_page.title: Our Products
products_page.why_desc: Our Grifo Flex mosquito nets are made in Italy with high quality materials. Each product is designed to provide optimal protection against insects while remaining aesthetic and discreet. Aluminium Space offers professional custom installation in Mghira and throughout the Ben Arous region.
products_page.feat1_desc: PVC-coated fiberglass, resistant white aluminum frame.
products_page.feat2_desc: Each mosquito net is adapted to the exact dimensions of your opening.
products_page.feat3_desc: Precision spring mechanisms, double brush-seal slides.

product_detail.colibri_h250: For windows height 170.1 cm to 250 cm
product_detail.large_openings_desc: Discover the Sidney 50 AC — up to 400cm wide.
product_detail.tva_notice: These prices are excl. tax. 19% VAT will be added in the final quote.

contact_page.description: Don't hesitate to contact us for any question or quote request.

devis_page.title: Request a Quote
devis_page.subtitle: Get a precise estimate in a few steps

footer.vr_sub: Experience your windows in virtual reality
footer.motto: Being among the best with a touch that stands out.
footer.brand_desc: Aluminium carpentry specialist in Mghira, Ben Arous. We manufacture and install high quality custom mosquito nets for your comfort.
